channel.title: Research Projects on Harish Baki
channel.description: Recent content in Research Projects on Harish Baki

item.title: DFS Project
item.description:
Organization: Collaborative Forecasting Program
Period: 2025-Present

Applied atmospheric forecasting collaboration for model development and performance improvement.

Replace this content with your finalized project summary, responsibilities, outcomes, and links.

item.title: EU-SCORES (TU Delft)
item.description:
Organization: TU Delft
Period: 2022-2024

Integrated offshore renewable systems research with atmospheric and wind-resource modeling contributions.

Replace this content with your finalized project summary, responsibilities, outcomes, and links.

item.title: WISER Project
item.description:
Organization: University at Albany
Period: 2024-2025

Early-stage collaboration on weather-intelligence and resilience-oriented modeling workflows.

Replace this content with your finalized project summary, responsibilities, outcomes, and links.
